steps.title: Read the opening contrast
steps.content: The underlined lines contrast sleeping fields with the speaker's heart, which alone remains awake. The function must capture that solitary experience of evening.

steps.title: Match solitary wakefulness
steps.content: B invents a preference for fields over water, C invents other people's dislike of rural places, and D wrongly says the speaker has woken from sleep. The lines present the speaker as alone while the evening world rests. The answer is A.
